content: TS 5.0 ships TC39 Stage 3 decorators by default. Decorator signature is (value, context) where context.name/kind/addInitializer/metadata are available. TS 5.2 adds Symbol.metadata: decorators write to context.metadata during class definition; after all decorators run, MyClass[Symbol.metadata] holds the accumulated object. No reflect-metadata needed. emitDecoratorMetadata is NOT compatible with Stage 3. experimentalDecorators uses old (target, key, descriptor) signature, requires reflect-metadata, supports parameter decorators. You cannot mix both in the same project. For a schema metadata layer with minimal deps, Stage 3 + Symbol.metadata is the right choice in TS 5.x.
